text: 3/29/26, 12.20 AM COP 3353 User-Level Introduction to Linux for IT University of South Florida COP 3353 User-Level Introduction to Linux for IT Credit(s): 3 Description Introduction to & modern Linux distribution; installation in a desktop-friendly virtualized environment; users and software packages management; usage of the shell for navigation, and text processing command line tools Prerequisite(s): CQP 2512 https Ilcatalog usf edulpreview course_nopop php?catoid-23&coid-103464&print 1/1
